tEn: Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Visual Recognition
tZh: 用于视觉识别的深度高分辨率表示学习
sEn: HRNet maintains high-resolution representations throughout the process, achieving richer semantics and higher spatial precision.
sZh: HRNet在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示，实现了更丰富的语义和更高的空间精度。
absEn: High-resolution representations are essential for position-sensitive vision problems, such as human pose estimation, semantic segmentation, and object detection. Existing state-of-the-art frameworks first encode the input image as a low-resolution representation through a subnetwork that is formed by connecting high-to-low resolution convolutions \emph{in series} (e.g., ResNet, VGGNet), and then recover the high-resolution representation from the encoded low-resolution representation. Instead, our proposed network, named as High-Resolution Network (HRNet), maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process. There are two key characteristics: (i) Connect the high-to-low resolution convolution streams \emph{in parallel}; (ii) Repeatedly exchange the information across resolutions. The benefit is that the resulting representation is semantically richer and spatially more precise. We show the superiority of the proposed HRNet in a wide range of applications, including human pose estimation, semantic segmentation, and object detection, suggesting that the HRNet is a stronger backbone for computer vision problems. All the codes are available at~{\url{https://github.com/HRNet}}.
absZh: 高分辨率表示对于位置敏感的视觉问题（如人体姿态估计、语义分割和物体检测）至关重要。现有的最先进框架首先通过一个由高到低分辨率卷积串联（如ResNet、VGGNet）组成的子网络将输入图像编码为低分辨率表示，然后从编码的低分辨率表示中恢复高分辨率表示。相反，我们提出的网络，称为高分辨率网络（HRNet），在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。有两个关键特征：（i）将高到低分辨率卷积流并行连接；（ii）跨分辨率反复交换信息。其好处是得到的表示在语义上更丰富，空间上更精确。我们在广泛的应用中展示了所提出的HRNet的优越性，包括人体姿态估计、语义分割和物体检测，表明HRNet是计算机视觉问题的一个更强的骨干网络。所有代码可在https://github.com/HRNet获取。

contrib.en: Proposes HRNet that maintains high-resolution representations throughout the entire process via parallel multi-resolution convolutions.
contrib.zh: 提出HRNet，通过并行多分辨率卷积在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。

contrib.en: Introduces repeated multi-resolution fusion to exchange information across parallel streams, enhancing semantic richness and spatial precision.
contrib.zh: 引入重复多分辨率融合，在并行流之间交换信息，增强语义丰富性和空间精度。

contrib.en: Demonstrates superior performance on human pose estimation, semantic segmentation, and object detection compared to state-of-the-art methods.
contrib.zh: 在人体姿态估计、语义分割和目标检测上，相比现有最优方法展现了优越性能。

contrib.en: Provides two versions: HRNetV1 for pose estimation and HRNetV2 for segmentation, with HRNetV2p for detection, showing versatility.
contrib.zh: 提供两个版本：HRNetV1用于姿态估计，HRNetV2用于分割，HRNetV2p用于检测，展示了多功能性。

contrib.en: Establishes connection between multi-resolution fusion and regular convolution, justifying exploration of all resolutions.
contrib.zh: 建立了多分辨率融合与常规卷积之间的联系，为探索所有分辨率提供了依据。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results with comparable model size and lower computation complexity on multiple benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在多个基准上以相当的模型大小和更低的计算复杂度取得了最优结果。

limits.en: Memory cost during training for object detection is slightly larger than state-of-the-art methods.
limits.zh: 目标检测训练时的内存成本略高于现有最优方法。

limits.en: Training time for pose estimation is a little larger on PyTorch, though comparable on MXNet with static graph.
limits.zh: 在PyTorch上姿态估计的训练时间稍长，但在支持静态图的MXNet上相当。

limits.en: Performance gain from HRNetV2 over HRNetV1 is minor for large models in Cityscapes segmentation.
limits.zh: 在Cityscapes分割中，HRNetV2相比HRNetV1对大模型的性能提升较小。

limits.en: The study does not explore resolutions higher than 1/4 of input, leaving potential for further improvement.
limits.zh: 研究未探索高于输入1/4的分辨率，留下了进一步改进的潜力。

limits.en: Combination with ASPP or PPM did not improve Cityscapes segmentation, limiting certain fusion strategies.
limits.zh: 与ASPP或PPM结合未改善Cityscapes分割，限制了某些融合策略。

items.en: High-resolution representations are essential for position-sensitive vision problems, such as human pose estimation, semantic segmentation, and object detection. Existing state-of-the-art frameworks first encode the input image as a low-resolution representation through a subnetwork that is formed by connecting high-to-low resolution convolutions in series (e.g., ResNet, VGGNet), and then recover the high-resolution representation from the encoded low-resolution representation. Instead, our proposed network, named as High-Resolution Network (HRNet), maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process. There are two key characteristics: (i) Connect the high-to-low resolution convolution streams in parallel; (ii) Repeatedly exchange the information across resolutions. The benefit is that the resulting representation is semantically richer and spatially more precise. We show the superiority of the proposed HRNet in a wide range of applications, including human pose estimation, semantic segmentation, and object detection, suggesting that the HRNet is a stronger backbone for computer vision problems. All the codes are available at https://github.com/HRNet.
items.zh: 高分辨率表示对于位置敏感的视觉问题至关重要，例如人体姿态估计、语义分割和目标检测。现有的最先进框架首先通过一个由串联的高到低分辨率卷积组成的子网络（例如 ResNet、VGGNet）将输入图像编码为低分辨率表示，然后从编码的低分辨率表示中恢复高分辨率表示。相反，我们提出的网络名为高分辨率网络（HRNet），在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。有两个关键特征：（i）并行连接高到低分辨率卷积流；（ii）跨分辨率重复交换信息。其好处是生成的表示在语义上更丰富，空间上更精确。我们展示了所提出的 HRNet 在广泛应用中的优越性，包括人体姿态估计、语义分割和目标检测，表明 HRNet 是计算机视觉问题中更强的骨干网络。所有代码可在 https://github.com/HRNet 获取。

items.en: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art results in many computer vision tasks, such as image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, human pose estimation, and so on. The strength is that DCNNs are able to learn richer representations than conventional hand-crafted representations.
items.zh: 深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了最先进的结果，例如图像分类、目标检测、语义分割、人体姿态估计等。其优势在于 DCNN 能够学习比传统手工表示更丰富的表示。

items.en: Most recently-developed classification networks, including AlexNet [77], VGGNet [126], GoogleNet [133], ResNet [54], etc., follow the design rule of LeNet-555 [81]. The rule is depicted in Figure 1 (a): gradually reduce the spatial size of the feature maps, connect the convolutions from high resolution to low resolution in series, and lead to a low-resolution representation, which is further processed for classification.
items.zh: 最近开发的分类网络，包括 AlexNet [77]、VGGNet [126]、GoogleNet [133]、ResNet [54] 等，都遵循 LeNet-5 [81] 的设计规则。该规则如图 1（a）所示：逐渐减小特征图的空间尺寸，将卷积从高分辨率到低分辨率串联，得到低分辨率表示，并进一步用于分类。

items.en: High-resolution representations are needed for position-sensitive tasks, e.g., semantic segmentation, human pose estimation, and object detection. The previous state-of-the-art methods adopt the high-resolution recovery process to raise the representation resolution from the low-resolution representation outputted by a classification or classification-like network as depicted in Figure 1 (b), e.g., Hourglass [105], SegNet [3], DeconvNet [107], U-Net [119], SimpleBaseline [152], and encoder-decoder [112]. In addition, dilated convolutions are used to remove some down-sample layers and thus yield medium-resolution representations [19, 181].
items.zh: 位置敏感任务需要高分辨率表示，例如语义分割、人体姿态估计和目标检测。先前的最先进方法采用高分辨率恢复过程，从分类或类似分类网络输出的低分辨率表示中提高表示分辨率，如图 1（b）所示，例如 Hourglass [105]、SegNet [3]、DeconvNet [107]、U-Net [119]、SimpleBaseline [152] 和编码器-解码器 [112]。此外，使用空洞卷积移除一些下采样层，从而产生中等分辨率表示 [19, 181]。

items.en: We present a novel architecture, namely High-Resolution Net (HRNet), which is able to maintain high-resolution representations through the whole process. We start from a high-resolution convolution stream, gradually add high-to-low resolution convolution streams one by one, and connect the multi-resolution streams in parallel. The resulting network consists of several (444 in this paper) stages as depicted in Figure 2, and the n𝑛nth stage contains n𝑛n streams corresponding to n𝑛n resolutions. We conduct repeated multi-resolution fusions by exchanging the information across the parallel streams over and over.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的架构，即高分辨率网络（HRNet），它能够在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示。我们从高分辨率卷积流开始，逐步添加高到低分辨率卷积流，并并行连接多分辨率流。得到的网络由多个（本文中为 4 个）阶段组成，如图 2 所示，第 n 阶段包含 n 个流，对应 n 个分辨率。我们通过反复跨并行流交换信息来进行重复的多分辨率融合。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The structure of recovering high resolution from low resolution. (a) A low-resolution representation learning subnetwork (such as VGGNet [126], ResNet [54]), which is formed by connecting high-to-low convolutions in series. (b) A high-resolution representation recovering subnetwork, which is formed by connecting low-to-high convolutions in series. Representative examples include SegNet [3], DeconvNet [107], U-Net [119] and Hourglass [105], encoder-decoder [112], and SimpleBaseline [152].
items.capZh: 图 1：从低分辨率恢复高分辨率的结构。（a）低分辨率表示学习子网络（例如 VGGNet [126]、ResNet [54]），由串联的高到低分辨率卷积组成。（b）高分辨率表示恢复子网络，由串联的低到高分辨率卷积组成。代表性示例包括 SegNet [3]、DeconvNet [107]、U-Net [119] 和 Hourglass [105]、编码器-解码器 [112] 以及 SimpleBaseline [152]。

items.en: The high-resolution representations learned from HRNet are not only semantically strong but also spatially precise. This comes from two aspects. (\romannum1) Our approach connects high-to-low resolution convolution streams in parallel rather than in series. Thus, our approach is able to maintain the high resolution instead of recovering high resolution from low resolution, and accordingly the learned representation is potentially spatially more precise. (\romannum2) Most existing fusion schemes aggregate high-resolution low-level and high-level representations obtained by upsampling low-resolution representations. Instead, we repeat multi-resolution fusions to boost the high-resolution representations with the help of the low-resolution representations, and vice versa. As a result, all the high-to-low resolution representations are semantically strong.
items.zh: 从 HRNet 学习到的高分辨率表示不仅在语义上强，而且在空间上精确。这来自两个方面：（i）我们的方法并行连接高到低分辨率卷积流，而不是串联。因此，我们的方法能够保持高分辨率，而不是从低分辨率恢复高分辨率，因此学习到的表示在空间上可能更精确。（ii）大多数现有的融合方案聚合通过上采样低分辨率表示获得的高分辨率低级和高级表示。相反，我们重复多分辨率融合，借助低分辨率表示增强高分辨率表示，反之亦然。结果，所有高到低分辨率表示在语义上都很强。

items.en: We present two versions of HRNet. The first one, named as HRNetV111, only outputs the high-resolution representation computed from the high-resolution convolution stream. We apply it to human pose estimation by following the heatmap estimation framework. We empirically demonstrate the superior pose estimation performance on the COCO keypoint detection dataset [94].
items.zh: 我们提出了两个版本的 HRNet。第一个版本名为 HRNetV1，仅输出从高分辨率卷积流计算的高分辨率表示。我们通过遵循热图估计框架将其应用于人体姿态估计。我们在 COCO 关键点检测数据集 [94] 上实证展示了优越的姿态估计性能。

items.en: The other one, named as HRNetV222, combines the representations from all the high-to-low resolution parallel streams. We apply it to semantic segmentation through estimating segmentation maps from the combined high-resolution representation. The proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art results on PASCAL-Context, Cityscapes, and LIP with similar model sizes and lower computation complexity. We observe similar performance for HRNetV111 and HRNetV222 over COCO pose estimation, and the superiority of HRNetV222 to HRNet111 in semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 另一个版本名为 HRNetV2，结合了所有高到低分辨率并行流的表示。我们通过从组合的高分辨率表示估计分割图，将其应用于语义分割。所提出的方法在 PASCAL-Context、Cityscapes 和 LIP 上取得了最先进的结果，且模型大小相似，计算复杂度更低。我们观察到 HRNetV1 和 HRNetV2 在 COCO 姿态估计上的性能相似，而 HRNetV2 在语义分割上优于 HRNetV1。

items.en: In addition, we construct a multi-level representation, named as HRNetV222p, from the high-resolution representation output from HRNetV222, and apply it to state-of-the-art detection frameworks, including Faster R-CNN, Cascade R-CNN [12], FCOS [136], and CenterNet [36], and state-of-the-art joint detection and instance segmentation frameworks, including Mask R-CNN [53], Cascade Mask R-CNN, and Hybrid Task Cascade [16]. The results show that our method gets detection performance improvement and in particular dramatic improvement for small objects.
items.zh: 此外，我们从 HRNetV2 输出的高分辨率表示构建了一个多级表示，名为 HRNetV2p，并将其应用于最先进的检测框架，包括 Faster R-CNN、Cascade R-CNN [12]、FCOS [136] 和 CenterNet [36]，以及最先进的联合检测和实例分割框架，包括 Mask R-CNN [53]、Cascade Mask R-CNN 和 Hybrid Task Cascade [16]。结果表明，我们的方法获得了检测性能的提升，特别是对小物体的显著提升。

items.capEn: Figure 2: An example of a high-resolution network. Only the main body is illustrated, and the stem (two stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolutions) is not included. There are four stages. The 111st stage consists of high-resolution convolutions. The 222nd (333rd, 444th) stage repeats two-resolution (three-resolution, four-resolution) blocks. The detail is given in Section 3.
items.capZh: 图 2：高分辨率网络示例。仅展示了主体部分，不包括主干（两个步长为 2 的 3×3 卷积）。共有四个阶段。第一阶段由高分辨率卷积组成。第二阶段（第三、第四阶段）重复双分辨率（三分辨率、四分辨率）块。详细内容见第 3 节。

items.en: We review closely-related representation learning techniques developed mainly for human pose estimation [57], semantic segmentation and object detection, from three aspects: low-resolution representation learning, high-resolution representation recovering, and high-resolution representation maintaining. Besides, we mention about some works related to multi-scale fusion.
items.zh: 我们从三个方面回顾了主要针对人体姿态估计 [57]、语义分割和目标检测开发的紧密相关的表示学习技术：低分辨率表示学习、高分辨率表示恢复和高分辨率表示保持。此外，我们提及了一些与多尺度融合相关的工作。

items.en: Learning low-resolution representations. The fully-convolutional network approaches [99, 124] compute low-resolution representations by removing the fully-connected layers in a classification network, and estimate their coarse segmentation maps. The estimated segmentation maps are improved by combining the fine segmentation score maps estimated from intermediate low-level medium-resolution representations [99], or iterating the processes [76]. Similar techniques have also been applied to edge detection, e.g., holistic edge detection [157].
items.zh: 学习低分辨率表示。全卷积网络方法 [99, 124] 通过移除分类网络中的全连接层来计算低分辨率表示，并估计其粗略分割图。通过结合从中间低级中等分辨率表示估计的精细分割得分图 [99] 或迭代该过程 [76]，可以改进估计的分割图。类似的技术也已应用于边缘检测，例如整体边缘检测 [157]。

items.en: The fully convolutional network is extended, by replacing a few (typically two) strided convolutions and the associated convolutions with dilated convolutions, to the dilation version, leading to medium-resolution representations [181, 19, 168, 18, 86]. The representations are further augmented to multi-scale contextual representations [181, 19, 21] through feature pyramids for segmenting objects at multiple scales.
items.zh: 全卷积网络通过将几个（通常两个）步长卷积及其相关卷积替换为空洞卷积，扩展为空洞版本，从而产生中等分辨率表示 [181, 19, 168, 18, 86]。这些表示进一步通过特征金字塔增强为多尺度上下文表示 [181, 19, 21]，用于多尺度分割目标。

items.en: Recovering high-resolution representations. An upsample process can be used to gradually recover the high-resolution representations from the low-resolution representations. The upsample subnetwork could be a symmetric version of the downsample process (e.g., VGGNet), with skipping connection over some mirrored layers to transform the pooling indices, e.g., SegNet [3] and DeconvNet [107], or copying the feature maps, e.g., U-Net [119] and Hourglass [105, 27, 165, 68, 163, 9, 31, 8, 134], encoder-decoder [112], and so on. An extension of U-Net, full-resolution residual network [114], introduces an extra full-resolution stream that carries information at the full image resolution, to replace the skip connections, and each unit in the downsample and upsample subnetworks receives information from and sends information to the full-resolution stream.
items.zh: 恢复高分辨率表示。可以使用上采样过程从低分辨率表示逐渐恢复高分辨率表示。上采样子网络可以是下采样过程（例如 VGGNet）的对称版本，通过跳过连接在某些镜像层上传递池化索引，例如 SegNet [3] 和 DeconvNet [107]，或复制特征图，例如 U-Net [119] 和 Hourglass [105, 27, 165, 68, 163, 9, 31, 8, 134]、编码器-解码器 [112] 等。U-Net 的一个扩展，全分辨率残差网络 [114]，引入了一个额外的全分辨率流，以全图像分辨率携带信息，以替代跳过连接，并且下采样和上采样子网络中的每个单元都从全分辨率流接收信息并向其发送信息。

items.en: The asymmetric upsample process is also widely studied. RefineNet [90] improves the combination of upsampled representations and the representations of the same resolution copied from the downsample process. Other works include: light upsample process [7, 24, 152, 92], possibly with dilated convolutions used in the backbone [63, 113, 89]; light downsample and heavy upsample processes [141], recombinator networks [55]; improving skip connections with more or complicated convolutional units [111, 180, 64], as well as sending information from low-resolution skip connections to high-resolution skip connections [189] or exchanging information between them [49]; studying the details of the upsample process [147]; combining multi-scale pyramid representations [22, 154]; stacking multiple DeconvNets/U-Nets/Hourglass [44, 149] with dense connections [135].
items.zh: 非对称上采样过程也得到了广泛研究。RefineNet [90] 改进了上采样表示与从下采样过程复制的相同分辨率表示的组合。其他工作包括：轻量上采样过程 [7, 24, 152, 92]，可能在骨干网络中使用空洞卷积 [63, 113, 89]；轻量下采样和重型上采样过程 [141]、重组网络 [55]；使用更多或更复杂的卷积单元改进跳过连接 [111, 180, 64]，以及将信息从低分辨率跳过连接发送到高分辨率跳过连接 [189] 或在它们之间交换信息 [49]；研究上采样过程的细节 [147]；组合多尺度金字塔表示 [22, 154]；堆叠多个 DeconvNet/U-Net/Hourglass [44, 149] 并带有密集连接 [135]。

items.en: Maintaining high-resolution representations. Our work is closely related to several works that can also generate high-resolution representations, e.g., convolutional neural fabrics [123], interlinked CNNs [188], GridNet [42], and multi-scale DenseNet [58].
items.zh: 保持高分辨率表示。我们的工作与几个也能生成高分辨率表示的工作密切相关，例如卷积神经织物 [123]、互连 CNN [188]、GridNet [42] 和多尺度 DenseNet [58]。

items.en: The two early works, convolutional neural fabrics [123] and interlinked CNNs [188], lack careful design on when to start low-resolution parallel streams, and how and where to exchange information across parallel streams, and do not use batch normalization and residual connections, thus not showing satisfactory performance. GridNet [42] is like a combination of multiple U-Nets and includes two symmetric information exchange stages: the first stage passes information only from high resolution to low resolution, and the second stage passes information only from low resolution to high resolution. This limits its segmentation quality. Multi-scale DenseNet [58] is not able to learn strong high-resolution representations as there is no information received from low-resolution representations.
items.zh: 两个早期工作，卷积神经织物 [123] 和互连 CNN [188]，缺乏关于何时启动低分辨率并行流以及如何和在哪里跨并行流交换信息的精心设计，并且未使用批归一化和残差连接，因此未显示出令人满意的性能。GridNet [42] 类似于多个 U-Net 的组合，包括两个对称的信息交换阶段：第一阶段仅将信息从高分辨率传递到低分辨率，第二阶段仅将信息从低分辨率传递到高分辨率。这限制了其分割质量。多尺度 DenseNet [58] 无法学习强高分辨率表示，因为没有从低分辨率表示接收信息。

items.en: Multi-scale fusion. Multi-scale fusion111In this paper, Multi-scale fusion and multi-resolution fusion are interchangeable, but in other contexts, they may not be interchangeable. is widely studied [11, 19, 24, 42, 157, 181, 66, 161, 122, 123, 58, 188]. The straightforward way is to feed multi-resolution images separately into multiple networks and aggregate the output response maps [137]. Hourglass [105], U-Net [119], and SegNet [3] combine low-level features in the high-to-low downsample process into the same-resolution high-level features in the low-to-high upsample process progressively through skip connections. PSPNet [181] and DeepLabV2/3 [19] fuse the pyramid features obtained by pyramid pooling module and atrous spatial pyramid pooling. Our multi-scale (resolution) fusion module resembles the two pooling modules. The differences include: (1) Our fusion outputs four-resolution representations other than only one, and (2) our fusion modules are repeated several times which is inspired by deep fusion [143, 155, 129, 178, 184].
items.zh: 多尺度融合。多尺度融合 1 被广泛研究 [11, 19, 24, 42, 157, 181, 66, 161, 122, 123, 58, 188]。直接的方法是将多分辨率图像分别输入多个网络，并聚合输出响应图 [137]。Hourglass [105]、U-Net [119] 和 SegNet [3] 通过跳过连接逐步将高到低下采样过程中的低级特征与低到高上采样过程中的相同分辨率高级特征组合。PSPNet [181] 和 DeepLabV2/3 [19] 融合了通过金字塔池化模块和空洞空间金字塔池化获得的金字塔特征。我们的多尺度（分辨率）融合模块类似于这两个池化模块。不同之处包括：（1）我们的融合输出四个分辨率表示，而不仅仅是一个；（2）我们的融合模块重复多次，这受到深度融合的启发 [143, 155, 129, 178, 184]。

items.en: Our approach. Our network connects high-to-low convolution streams in parallel. It maintains high-resolution representations through the whole process, and generates reliable high-resolution representations with strong position sensitivity through repeatedly fusing the representations from multi-resolution streams.
items.zh: 我们的方法。我们的网络并行连接高到低分辨率卷积流。它在整个过程中保持高分辨率表示，并通过重复融合多分辨率流的表示，生成具有强位置敏感性的可靠高分辨率表示。

items.en: This paper represents a very substantial extension of our previous conference paper [130] with an additional material added from our unpublished technical report [131] as well as more object detection results under recently-developed start-of-the-art object detection and instance segmentation frameworks. The main technical novelties compared with [130] lie in threefold. (1) We extend the network (named as HRNetV111) proposed in [130], to two versions: HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p, which explore all the four-resolution representations. (2) We build the connection between multi-resolution fusion and regular convolution, which provides an evidence for the necessity of exploring all the four-resolution representations in HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p. (3) We show the superiority of HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p over HRNetV111 and present the applications of HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p in a broad range of vision problems, including semantic segmentation and object detection.
items.zh: 本文是我们先前会议论文[130]的实质性扩展，新增了来自未发表技术报告[131]的额外材料，以及在最新开发的先进目标检测和实例分割框架下的更多目标检测结果。与[130]相比，主要技术新颖性体现在三个方面：(1) 我们将[130]中提出的网络（称为HRNetV111）扩展为两个版本：HRNetV222和HRNetV222p，它们探索了所有四种分辨率表示。(2) 我们建立了多分辨率融合与常规卷积之间的联系，为在HRNetV222和HRNetV222p中探索所有四种分辨率表示的必要性提供了证据。(3) 我们展示了HRNetV222和HRNetV222p相对于HRNetV111的优越性，并介绍了HRNetV222和HRNetV222p在广泛视觉问题中的应用，包括语义分割和目标检测。

items.en: We input the image into a stem, which consists of two stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolutions decreasing the resolution to 1414\frac{1}{4}, and subsequently the main body that outputs the representation with the same resolution (1414\frac{1}{4}). The main body, illustrated in Figure 2 and detailed below, consists of several components: parallel multi-resolution convolutions, repeated multi-resolution fusions, and representation head that is shown in Figure 4.
items.zh: 我们将图像输入到一个主干网络中，该网络由两个步长为2的3×3卷积组成，将分辨率降低到1/4，随后是主体部分，输出相同分辨率（1/4）的表示。主体部分如图2所示，详细描述如下，包含几个组件：并行多分辨率卷积、重复的多分辨率融合以及图4所示的表示头。

items.en: We start from a high-resolution convolution stream as the first stage, gradually add high-to-low resolution streams one by one, forming new stages, and connect the multi-resolution streams in parallel. As a result, the resolutions for the parallel streams of a later stage consists of the resolutions from the previous stage, and an extra lower one.
items.zh: 我们从高分辨率卷积流作为第一阶段开始，逐步逐个添加高到低分辨率流，形成新的阶段，并将多分辨率流并行连接。因此，后一阶段并行流的分辨率由前一阶段的分辨率和一个额外的较低分辨率组成。

items.en: An example network structure illustrated in Figure 2, containing 444 parallel streams, is logically as follows,
items.zh: 图2中所示的一个示例网络结构包含4个并行流，逻辑上如下：

items.en: where 𝒩s​rsubscript𝒩𝑠𝑟\mathcal{N}_{sr} is a sub-stream in the s𝑠sth stage and r𝑟r is the resolution index. The resolution index of the first stream is r=1𝑟1r=1. The resolution of index r𝑟r is 12r−11superscript2𝑟1\frac{1}{2^{r-1}} of the resolution of the first stream.
items.zh: 其中𝒩_sr是第s阶段中的子流，r是分辨率索引。第一个流的分辨率索引为r=1。索引r的分辨率是第一个流分辨率的1/2^(r-1)。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Illustrating how the fusion module aggregates the information for high, medium and low resolutions from left to right, respectively. Right legend: strided 3×3333\times 3 = stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolution, up samp. 1×1111\times 1 = bilinear upsampling followed by a 1×1111\times 1 convolution.
items.capZh: 图3：从左到右分别说明融合模块如何聚合高、中、低分辨率的信息。右侧图例：步长3×3 = 步长为2的3×3卷积，上采样1×1 = 双线性上采样后接1×1卷积。

items.en: The goal of the fusion module is to exchange the information across multi-resolution representations. It is repeated several times (e.g., every 444 residual units).
items.zh: 融合模块的目标是在多分辨率表示之间交换信息。它重复多次（例如，每4个残差单元）。

items.en: Let us look at an example of fusing 333-resolution representations, which is illustrated in Figure 3. Fusing 222 representations and 444 representations can be easily derived. The input consists of three representations: {𝐑ri,r=1,2,3}formulae-sequencesuperscriptsubscript𝐑𝑟𝑖𝑟123\{\mathbf{R}_{r}^{i},r=1,2,3\}, with r𝑟r is the resolution index, and the associated output representations are {𝐑ro,r=1,2,3}formulae-sequencesuperscriptsubscript𝐑𝑟𝑜𝑟123\{\mathbf{R}_{r}^{o},r=1,2,3\}. Each output representation is the sum of the transformed representations of the three inputs: 𝐑ro=f1​r​(𝐑1i)+f2​r​(𝐑2i)+f3​r​(𝐑3i)superscriptsubscript𝐑𝑟𝑜subscript𝑓1𝑟superscriptsubscript𝐑1𝑖subscript𝑓2𝑟superscriptsubscript𝐑2𝑖subscript𝑓3𝑟superscriptsubscript𝐑3𝑖\mathbf{R}_{r}^{o}=f_{1r}(\mathbf{R}_{1}^{i})+f_{2r}(\mathbf{R}_{2}^{i})+f_{3r}(\mathbf{R}_{3}^{i}). The fusion across stages (from stage 333 to stage 444) has an extra output: 𝐑4o=f14​(𝐑1i)+f24​(𝐑2i)+f34​(𝐑3i)superscriptsubscript𝐑4𝑜subscript𝑓14superscriptsubscript𝐑1𝑖subscript𝑓24superscriptsubscript𝐑2𝑖subscript𝑓34superscriptsubscript𝐑3𝑖\mathbf{R}_{4}^{o}=f_{14}(\mathbf{R}_{1}^{i})+f_{24}(\mathbf{R}_{2}^{i})+f_{34}(\mathbf{R}_{3}^{i}).
items.zh: 让我们看一个融合3个分辨率表示的示例，如图3所示。融合2个和4个表示的情况可以很容易推导。输入包含三个表示：{R_r^i, r=1,2,3}，其中r是分辨率索引，对应的输出表示为{R_r^o, r=1,2,3}。每个输出表示是三个输入变换后的表示之和：R_r^o = f_1r(R_1^i) + f_2r(R_2^i) + f_3r(R_3^i)。跨阶段融合（从阶段3到阶段4）有一个额外的输出：R_4^o = f_14(R_1^i) + f_24(R_2^i) + f_34(R_3^i)。

items.en: The choice of the transform function fx​r​(⋅)subscript𝑓𝑥𝑟⋅f_{xr}(\cdot) is dependent on the input resolution index x𝑥x and the output resolution index r𝑟r. If x=r𝑥𝑟x=r, fx​r​(𝐑)=𝐑subscript𝑓𝑥𝑟𝐑𝐑f_{xr}(\mathbf{R})=\mathbf{R}. If x<r𝑥𝑟x<r, fx​r​(𝐑)subscript𝑓𝑥𝑟𝐑f_{xr}(\mathbf{R}) downsamples the input representation 𝐑𝐑\mathbf{R} through (r−s)𝑟𝑠(r-s) stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolutions. For instance, one stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolution for 2×2\times downsampling, and two consecutive stride-222 3×3333\times 3 convolutions for 4×4\times downsampling. If x>r𝑥𝑟x>r, fx​r​(𝐑)subscript𝑓𝑥𝑟𝐑f_{xr}(\mathbf{R}) upsamples the input representation 𝐑𝐑\mathbf{R} through the bilinear upsampling followed by a 1×1111\times 1 convolution for aligning the number of channels. The functions are depicted in Figure 3.
items.zh: 变换函数f_xr(·)的选择取决于输入分辨率索引x和输出分辨率索引r。如果x=r，则f_xr(R)=R。如果x<r，则f_xr(R)通过(r-s)个步长为2的3×3卷积对输入表示R进行下采样。例如，一个步长为2的3×3卷积用于2倍下采样，两个连续的步长为2的3×3卷积用于4倍下采样。如果x>r，则f_xr(R)通过双线性上采样后接1×1卷积来对齐通道数，对输入表示R进行上采样。这些函数如图3所示。

items.en: We have three kinds of representation heads that are illustrated in Figure 4, and call them as HRNetV111, HRNetV222, and HRNetV111p, respectively.
items.zh: 我们有三种表示头，如图4所示，分别称为HRNetV111、HRNetV222和HRNetV111p。

items.en: HRNetV111. The output is the representation only from the high-resolution stream. Other three representations are ignored. This is illustrated in Figure 4 (a).
items.zh: HRNetV111。输出仅来自高分辨率流的表示。其他三个表示被忽略。如图4(a)所示。

items.en: HRNetV222. We rescale the low-resolution representations through bilinear upsampling without changing the number of channels to the high resolution, and concatenate the four representations, followed by a 1×1111\times 1 convolution to mix the four representations. This is illustrated in Figure 4 (b).
items.zh: HRNetV222。我们通过双线性上采样将低分辨率表示缩放到高分辨率，而不改变通道数，然后将四个表示拼接起来，接着使用1×1卷积混合这四个表示。如图4(b)所示。

items.en: HRNetV222p. We construct multi-level representations by downsampling the high-resolution representation output from HRNetV222 to multiple levels. This is depicted in Figure 4 (c).
items.zh: HRNetV222p。我们通过对HRNetV222输出的高分辨率表示进行下采样，构建多级表示。如图4(c)所示。

items.en: In this paper, we will show the results of applying HRNetV111 to human pose estimation, HRNetV222 to semantic segmentation, and HRNetV222p to object detection.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们将展示将HRNetV111应用于人体姿态估计、HRNetV222应用于语义分割以及HRNetV222p应用于目标检测的结果。

items.en: The main body contains four stages with four parallel convolution streams. The resolutions are 1/4141/4, 1/8181/8, 1/161161/16, and 1/321321/32. The first stage contains 444 residual units where each unit is formed by a bottleneck with the width 646464, and is followed by one 3×3333\times 3 convolution changing the width of feature maps to C𝐶C. The 222nd, 333rd, 444th stages contain 111, 444, 333 modularized blocks, respectively. Each branch in multi-resolution parallel convolution of the modularized block contains 444 residual units. Each unit contains two 3×3333\times 3 convolutions for each resolution, where each convolution is followed by batch normalization and the nonlinear activation ReLU. The widths (numbers of channels) of the convolutions of the four resolutions are C𝐶C, 2​C2𝐶2C, 4​C4𝐶4C, and 8​C8𝐶8C, respectively. An example is depicted in Figure 2.
items.zh: 主体包含四个阶段，每个阶段有四个并行的卷积流。分辨率分别为1/4、1/8、1/16和1/32。第一阶段包含4个残差单元，每个单元由一个宽度为64的瓶颈组成，随后是一个3×3卷积，将特征图的宽度变为C。第二、三、四阶段分别包含1、4、3个模块化块。模块化块的多分辨率并行卷积中，每个分支包含4个残差单元。每个单元在每个分辨率下包含两个3×3卷积，每个卷积后接批归一化和非线性激活ReLU。四个分辨率卷积的宽度（通道数）分别为C、2C、4C和8C。图2给出了一个示例。

items.en: We analyze the modularized block that is divided into two components: multi-resolution parallel convolutions (Figure 5 (a)), and multi-resolution fusion (Figure 5 (b)). The multi-resolution parallel convolution resembles the group convolution. It divides the input channels into several subsets of channels and performs a regular convolution over each subset over different spatial resolutions separately, while in the group convolution, the resolutions are the same. This connection implies that the multi-resolution parallel convolution enjoys some benefit of the group convolution.
items.zh: 我们分析模块化块，它分为两个组件：多分辨率并行卷积（图5(a)）和多分辨率融合（图5(b)）。多分辨率并行卷积类似于分组卷积。它将输入通道分成若干子集，并在不同空间分辨率上分别对每个子集进行常规卷积，而分组卷积中分辨率相同。这种联系表明多分辨率并行卷积享有分组卷积的某些优势。

items.en: The multi-resolution fusion unit resembles the multi-branch full-connection form of the regular convolution, illustrated in Figure 5 (c). A regular convolution can be divided as multiple small convolutions as explained in [178]. The input channels are divided into several subsets, and the output channels are also divided into several subsets. The input and output subsets are connected in a fully-connected fashion, and each connection is a regular convolution. Each subset of output channels is a summation of the outputs of the convolutions over each subset of input channels. The differences lie in that our multi-resolution fusion needs to handle the resolution change. The connection between multi-resolution fusion and regular convolution provides an evidence for exploring all the four-resolution representations done in HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p.
items.zh: 多分辨率融合单元类似于常规卷积的多分支全连接形式，如图5(c)所示。常规卷积可以分解为多个小卷积，如文献[178]所述。输入通道被分成若干子集，输出通道也被分成若干子集。输入和输出子集以全连接方式连接，每个连接是一个常规卷积。每个输出通道子集是输入通道子集上卷积输出的总和。不同之处在于，我们的多分辨率融合需要处理分辨率变化。多分辨率融合与常规卷积之间的联系为探索HRNetV2和HRNetV2p中所有四种分辨率表示提供了证据。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Qualitative COCO human pose estimation results over representative images with various human size, different poses, or clutter background.
items.capZh: 图6：COCO人体姿态估计在具有不同人体尺寸、不同姿态或杂乱背景的代表性图像上的定性结果。

items.en: Human pose estimation, a.k.a. keypoint detection, aims to detect the locations of K𝐾K keypoints or parts (e.g., elbow, wrist, etc) from an image 𝐈𝐈\mathbf{I} of size W×H×3𝑊𝐻3W\times H\times 3. We follow the state-of-the-art framework and transform this problem to estimating K𝐾K heatmaps of size W4×H4𝑊4𝐻4\frac{W}{4}\times\frac{H}{4}, {𝐇1,𝐇2,…,𝐇K}subscript𝐇1subscript𝐇2…subscript𝐇𝐾\{\mathbf{H}_{1},\mathbf{H}_{2},\dots,\mathbf{H}_{K}\}, where each heatmap 𝐇ksubscript𝐇𝑘\mathbf{H}_{k} indicates the location confidence of the k𝑘kth keypoint.
items.zh: 人体姿态估计，也称为关键点检测，旨在从大小为W×H×3的图像I中检测K个关键点或部位（例如肘部、腕部等）的位置。我们遵循最先进的框架，将该问题转化为估计K个大小为W/4×H/4的热图{H1, H2, …, HK}，其中每个热图Hk表示第k个关键点的位置置信度。

items.en: We regress the heatmaps over the high-resolution representations output by HRNetV111. We empirically observe that the performance is almost the same for HRNetV111 and HRNetV222, and thus we choose HRNetV111 as its computation complexity is a little lower. The loss function, defined as the mean squared error, is applied for comparing the predicted heatmaps and the groundtruth heatmaps. The groundtruth heatmaps are generated by applying 222D Gaussian with standard deviation of 222 pixel centered on the groundtruth location of each keypoint. Some example results are given in Figure 6.
items.zh: 我们在HRNetV1输出的高分辨率表示上回归热图。我们凭经验观察到HRNetV1和HRNetV2的性能几乎相同，因此我们选择HRNetV1，因为其计算复杂度稍低。损失函数定义为均方误差，用于比较预测热图和真实热图。真实热图通过以每个关键点的真实位置为中心、标准差为2像素的2D高斯生成。图6给出了一些示例结果。

items.en: Dataset. The COCO dataset [94] contains over 200,000200000200,000 images and 250,000250000250,000 person instances labeled with 171717 keypoints. We train our model on the COCO train2017 set, including 57​K57𝐾57K images and 150​K150𝐾150K person instances. We evaluate our approach on the val2017 and test-dev2017 sets, containing 500050005000 images and 20​K20𝐾20K images, respectively.
items.zh: 数据集。COCO数据集[94]包含超过200,000张图像和250,000个人体实例，标注了17个关键点。我们在COCO train2017集上训练模型，包括57K张图像和150K个人体实例。我们在val2017和test-dev2017集上评估方法，分别包含5,000张和20K张图像。

items.en: Evaluation metric. The standard evaluation metric is based on Object Keypoint Similarity (OKS): OKS=∑iexp⁡(−di2/2​s2​ki2)​δ​(vi>0)∑iδ​(vi>0).OKSsubscript𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑑𝑖22superscript𝑠2superscriptsubscript𝑘𝑖2𝛿subscript𝑣𝑖0subscript𝑖𝛿subscript𝑣𝑖0\operatorname{OKS}=\frac{\sum_{i}\exp(-d_{i}^{2}/2s^{2}k_{i}^{2})\delta(v_{i}>0)}{\sum_{i}\delta(v_{i}>0)}. Here disubscript𝑑𝑖d_{i} is the Euclidean distance between the detected keypoint and the corresponding ground truth, visubscript𝑣𝑖v_{i} is the visibility flag of the ground truth, s𝑠s is the object scale, and kisubscript𝑘𝑖k_{i} is a per-keypoint constant that controls falloff. We report standard average precision and recall scores222http://cocodataset.org/#keypoints-eval: AP50superscriptAP50\operatorname{AP}^{50} (APAP\operatorname{AP} at OKS=0.50OKS0.50\operatorname{OKS}=0.50), AP75superscriptAP75\operatorname{AP}^{75}, APAP\operatorname{AP} (the mean of APAP\operatorname{AP} scores at 101010 OKSOKS\operatorname{OKS} positions, 0.50,0.55,…,0.90,0.950.500.55…0.900.950.50,0.55,\dots,0.90,0.95); APMsuperscriptAP𝑀\operatorname{AP}^{M} for medium objects, APLsuperscriptAP𝐿\operatorname{AP}^{L} for large objects, and ARAR\operatorname{AR} (the mean of ARAR\operatorname{AR} scores at 101010 OKSOKS\operatorname{OKS} positions, 0.50,0.55,…,0.90,0.950.500.55…0.900.950.50,0.55,\dots,0.90,0.95).
items.zh: 评估指标。标准评估指标基于目标关键点相似度（OKS）：OKS = ∑_i exp(-d_i^2 / (2 s^2 k_i^2)) δ(v_i > 0) / ∑_i δ(v_i > 0)。其中d_i是检测关键点与对应真实点之间的欧氏距离，v_i是真实点的可见性标志，s是目标尺度，k_i是控制衰减的每个关键点常数。我们报告标准的平均精度和召回率分数：AP^50（OKS=0.50时的AP）、AP^75、AP（在10个OKS位置0.50, 0.55, …, 0.90, 0.95上AP分数的平均值）；AP^M（中等目标）、AP^L（大目标）和AR（在10个OKS位置0.50, 0.55, …, 0.90, 0.95上AR分数的平均值）。

items.en: Training. We extend the human detection box in height or width to a fixed aspect ratio: height:width=4:3:heightwidth4:3\operatorname{height}:\operatorname{width}=4:3, and then crop the box from the image, which is resized to a fixed size, 256×192256192256\times 192 or 384×288384288384\times 288. The data augmentation scheme includes random rotation ([−45​°,45​°]-45°45°[$$,$$]), random scale ([0.65,1.35]0.651.35[0.65,1.35]), and flipping. Following [146], half body data augmentation is also involved.
items.zh: 训练。我们将人体检测框的高度或宽度扩展到固定宽高比：高度:宽度=4:3，然后从图像中裁剪该框，并将其调整为固定尺寸256×192或384×288。数据增强方案包括随机旋转（[-45°, 45°]）、随机缩放（[0.65, 1.35]）和翻转。遵循文献[146]，还涉及半身数据增强。

items.en: We use the Adam optimizer [71]. The learning schedule follows the setting [152]. The base learning rate is set as 1​e−31e31\mathrm{e}{-3}, and is dropped to 1​e−41e41\mathrm{e}{-4} and 1​e−51e51\mathrm{e}{-5} at the 170170170th and 200200200th epochs, respectively. The training process is terminated within 210210210 epochs. The models are trained on 444 V100100100 GPUs and it takes around 606060 (808080) hours for HRNet-W323232 (HRNet-W484848).
items.zh: 我们使用Adam优化器[71]。学习率计划遵循文献[152]的设置。基础学习率设为1e-3，并在第170和200个epoch时分别降至1e-4和1e-5。训练过程在210个epoch内终止。模型在4块V100 GPU上训练，HRNet-W32和HRNet-W48分别耗时约60和80小时。

items.en: Testing. The two-stage top-down paradigm similar as [109, 24, 152] is used: detect the person instance using a person detector, and then predict detection keypoints.
items.zh: 测试。使用类似于文献[109, 24, 152]的两阶段自顶向下范式：使用人体检测器检测人体实例，然后预测检测关键点。

items.en: We use the same person detectors provided by SimpleBaseline333https://github.com/Microsoft/human-pose-estimation.pytorch for both the val and test-dev sets. Following [152, 105, 24], we compute the heatmap by averaging the heatmaps of the original and flipped images. Each keypoint location is predicted by adjusting the highest heatvalue location with a quarter offset in the direction from the highest response to the second highest response.
items.zh: 我们使用SimpleBaseline提供的人体检测器用于val和test-dev集。遵循文献[152, 105, 24]，我们通过平均原始图像和翻转图像的热图来计算热图。每个关键点位置通过从最高响应到次高响应的方向，将最高热值位置调整四分之一偏移来预测。

items.en: Results on the val set. We report the results of our method and other state-of–the-art methods in Table I. The network - HRNetV111-W323232, trained from scratch with the input size 256×192256192256\times 192, achieves an AP score 73.473.473.4, outperforming other methods with the same input size. (\romannum1) Compared to Hourglass [105], our network improves AP by 6.56.56.5 points, and the GFLOP of our network is much lower and less than half, while the numbers of parameters are similar and ours is slightly larger. (\romannum2) Compared to CPN [24] w/o and w/ OHKM, our network, with slightly larger model size and slightly higher complexity, achieves 4.84.84.8 and 4.04.04.0 points gain, respectively. (\romannum3) Compared to the previous best-performed method SimpleBaseline [152], our HRNetV111-W323232 obtains significant improvements: 3.03.03.0 points gain for the backbone ResNet-505050 with a similar model size and GFLOPs, and 1.41.41.4 points gain for the backbone ResNet-152152152 whose model size (#Params) and GFLOPs are twice as many as ours.
items.zh: 验证集结果。我们在表I中报告了我们的方法和其他最先进方法的结果。网络HRNetV1-W32，输入尺寸256×192，从头训练，AP得分为73.4，优于具有相同输入尺寸的其他方法。(i) 与Hourglass[105]相比，我们的网络AP提高了6.5个百分点，且GFLOPs低得多，不到一半，而参数量相似，我们的略大。(ii) 与CPN[24]（无OHKM和有OHKM）相比，我们的网络模型尺寸略大、复杂度略高，分别提高了4.8和4.0个百分点。(iii) 与之前表现最好的方法SimpleBaseline[152]相比，我们的HRNetV1-W32取得了显著改进：对于骨干网络ResNet-50，在相似模型尺寸和GFLOPs下提高了3.0个百分点；对于骨干网络ResNet-152，其模型尺寸（参数量）和GFLOPs是我们的两倍，我们提高了1.4个百分点。

items.en: Our network can benefit from (\romannum1) training from the model pretrained on the ImageNet: The gain is 1.01.01.0 points for HRNetV111-W323232; (\romannum2) increasing the capacity by increasing the width: HRNetV111-W484848 gets 0.70.70.7 and 0.50.50.5 points gain for the input sizes 256×192256192256\times 192 and 384×288384288384\times 288, respectively.
items.zh: 我们的网络可以从以下方面受益：(i) 使用在ImageNet上预训练的模型进行训练：HRNetV1-W32提高了1.0个百分点；(ii) 通过增加宽度来增加容量：HRNetV1-W48在输入尺寸256×192和384×288下分别提高了0.7和0.5个百分点。

items.en: Considering the input size 384×288384288384\times 288, our HRNetV111-W323232 and HRNetV111-W484848, get the 75.875.875.8 and 76.376.376.3 AP, which have 1.41.41.4 and 1.21.21.2 improvements compared to the input size 256×192256192256\times 192. In comparison to SimpleBaseline [152] that uses ResNet-152152152 as the backbone, our HRNetV111-W323232 and HRNetV111-W484848 attain 1.51.51.5 and 2.02.02.0 points gain in terms of AP at 45%percent4545\% and 92.4%percent92.492.4\% computational cost, respectively.
items.zh: 对于输入尺寸384×288，我们的HRNetV1-W32和HRNetV1-W48分别获得75.8和76.3的AP，与输入尺寸256×192相比分别提高了1.4和1.2个百分点。与使用ResNet-152作为骨干网络的SimpleBaseline[152]相比，我们的HRNetV1-W32和HRNetV1-W48在AP上分别提高了1.5和2.0个百分点，而计算成本分别为45%和92.4%。

items.en: Results on the test-dev set. Table II reports the pose estimation performances of our approach and the existing state-of-the-art approaches. Our approach is significantly better than bottom-up approaches. On the other hand, our small network, HRNetV111-W323232, achieves an AP of 74.974.974.9. It outperforms all the other top-down approaches, and is more efficient in terms of model size (#Params) and computation complexity (GFLOPs). Our big model, HRNetV111-W484848, achieves the highest AP score 75.575.575.5. Compared to SimpleBaseline [152] with the same input size, our small and big networks receive 1.21.21.2 and 1.81.81.8 improvements, respectively. With the additional data from AI Challenger [148] for training, our single big network can obtain an AP of 77.077.077.0.
items.zh: 测试集结果。表II报告了我们的方法和现有最先进方法的姿态估计性能。我们的方法显著优于自底向上方法。另一方面，我们的小网络HRNetV1-W32达到了74.9的AP，优于所有其他自顶向下方法，并且在模型尺寸（参数量）和计算复杂度（GFLOPs）方面更高效。我们的大模型HRNetV1-W48达到了最高的AP分数75.5。与相同输入尺寸的SimpleBaseline[152]相比，我们的小网络和大网络分别提高了1.2和1.8个百分点。使用来自AI Challenger[148]的额外数据进行训练，我们的单个大网络可以获得77.0的AP。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Qualitative segmentation examples from Cityscapes (left two), PASCAL-Context (middle two), and LIP (right two).
items.capZh: 图7：来自Cityscapes（左两列）、PASCAL-Context（中间两列）和LIP（右两列）的定性分割示例。

items.en: Semantic segmentation is a problem of assigning a class label to each pixel. Some example results by our approach are given in Figure 7. We feed the input image to the HRNetV222 (Figure 4 (b)) and then pass the resulting 15​C15𝐶15C-dimensional representation at each position to a linear classifier with the softmax loss to predict the segmentation maps. The segmentation maps are upsampled (444 times) to the input size by bilinear upsampling for both training and testing. We report the results over two scene parsing datasets, PASCAL-Context [103] and Cityscapes [28], and a human parsing dataset, LIP [47]. The mean of class-wise intersection over union (mIoU) is adopted as the evaluation metric.
items.zh: 语义分割是为每个像素分配类别标签的问题。图7给出了我们方法的一些示例结果。我们将输入图像输入HRNetV2（图4(b)），然后将每个位置得到的15C维表示传递给带有softmax损失的线性分类器，以预测分割图。在训练和测试中，分割图通过双线性上采样（4倍）上采样到输入尺寸。我们在两个场景解析数据集PASCAL-Context[103]和Cityscapes[28]以及一个人体解析数据集LIP[47]上报告结果。采用类别平均交并比（mIoU）作为评估指标。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Qualitative examples for COCO object detection (left three) and instance segmentation (right three).
items.capZh: 图8：COCO目标检测（左三列）和实例分割（右三列）的定性示例。

items.en: Cityscapes. The Cityscapes dataset [28] contains 5,00050005,000 high quality pixel-level finely annotated scene images. The finely-annotated images are divided into 2,975/500/1,525297550015252,975/500/1,525 images for training, validation and testing. There are 303030 classes, and 191919 classes among them are used for evaluation. In addition to the mean of class-wise intersection over union (mIoU), we report other three scores on the test set: IoU category (cat.), iIoU class (cla.) and iIoU category (cat.).
items.zh: Cityscapes。Cityscapes数据集[28]包含5,000张高质量像素级精细标注的场景图像。精细标注的图像分为2,975/500/1,525张用于训练、验证和测试。共有30个类别，其中19个类别用于评估。除了类别平均交并比（mIoU）外，我们在测试集上还报告了其他三个分数：IoU类别（cat.）、iIoU类别（cla.）和iIoU类别（cat.）。

items.en: We follow the same training protocol [181, 182]. The data are augmented by random cropping (from 1024×2048102420481024\times 2048 to 512×10245121024512\times 1024), random scaling in the range of [0.5,2]0.52[0.5,2], and random horizontal flipping. We use the SGD optimizer with the base learning rate of 0.010.010.01, the momentum of 0.90.90.9 and the weight decay of 0.00050.00050.0005. The poly learning rate policy with the power of 0.90.90.9 is used for dropping the learning rate. All the models are trained for 120​K120𝐾120K iterations with the batch size of 121212 on 444 GPUs and syncBN.
items.zh: 我们遵循相同的训练协议[181, 182]。数据通过随机裁剪（从1024×2048到512×1024）、随机缩放（范围[0.5,2]）和随机水平翻转进行增强。我们使用SGD优化器，基础学习率为0.01，动量为0.9，权重衰减为0.0005。采用幂为0.9的多项式学习率策略来降低学习率。所有模型在4块GPU上以批量大小12训练120K次迭代，并使用同步批归一化（syncBN）。

items.en: PASCAL-Context. The PASCAL-Context dataset [103] includes 4,99849984,998 scene images for training and 5,10551055,105 images for testing with 595959 semantic labels and 111 background label.
items.zh: PASCAL-Context。PASCAL-Context数据集[103]包含4,998张场景图像用于训练，5,105张图像用于测试，具有59个语义标签和1个背景标签。

items.en: The data augmentation and learning rate policy are the same as Cityscapes. Following the widely-used training strategy [172, 32], we resize the images to 480×480480480480\times 480 and set the initial learning rate to 0.0040.0040.004 and weight decay to 0.00010.00010.0001. The batch size is 161616 and the number of iterations is 60​K60𝐾60K.
items.zh: 数据增强和学习率策略与Cityscapes相同。遵循广泛使用的训练策略[172, 32]，我们将图像调整为480×480，初始学习率设为0.004，权重衰减设为0.0001。批量大小为16，迭代次数为60K。

items.en: We follow the standard testing procedure [172, 32]. The image is resized to 480×480480480480\times 480 and then fed into our network. The resulting 480×480480480480\times 480 label maps are then resized to the original image size. We evaluate the performance of our approach and other approaches using six scales and flipping.
items.zh: 我们遵循标准测试流程[172, 32]。将图像调整为480×480后输入网络。生成的480×480标签图再调整回原始图像大小。我们使用六个尺度和翻转来评估我们方法及其他方法的性能。

items.en: LIP. The LIP dataset [47] contains 50,4625046250,462 elaborately annotated human images, which are divided into 30,4623046230,462 training images, and 10,0001000010,000 validation images. The methods are evaluated on 202020 categories (191919 human part labels and 111 background label). Following the standard training and testing settings [98], the images are resized to 473×473473473473\times 473 and the performance is evaluated on the average of the segmentation maps of the original and flipped images.
items.zh: LIP。LIP数据集[47]包含50,462张精心标注的人体图像，分为30,462张训练图像和10,000张验证图像。方法在20个类别（19个人体部位标签和1个背景标签）上进行评估。遵循标准训练和测试设置[98]，图像调整为473×473，性能评估基于原始图像和翻转图像分割图的平均值。

items.en: The data augmentation and learning rate policy are the same as Cityscapes. The training strategy follows the recent setting [98]. We set the initial learning rate to 0.0070.0070.007 and the momentum to 0.90.90.9 and the weight decay to 0.00050.00050.0005. The batch size is 404040 and the number of iterations is 110110110K.
items.zh: 数据增强和学习率策略与Cityscapes相同。训练策略遵循最近的设置[98]。初始学习率设为0.007，动量设为0.9，权重衰减设为0.0005。批量大小为40，迭代次数为110K。

items.en: We perform the evaluation on the MS COCO 201720172017 detection dataset, which contains about 118118118k images for training, 555k for validation (val) and ∼20similar-toabsent20\sim 20k testing without provided annotations (test-dev). The standard COCO-style evaluation is adopted. Some example results by our approach are given in Figure 8.
items.zh: 我们在MS COCO 2017检测数据集上进行评估，该数据集包含约118k张训练图像、5k张验证图像和约20k张无标注测试图像（test-dev）。采用标准的COCO风格评估。图8给出了我们方法的一些示例结果。

items.en: We apply our multi-level representations (HRNetV222p)444Same as FPN [93], we also use 555 levels., shown in Figure 4 (c), for object detection. The data is augmented by standard horizontal flipping. The input images are resized such that the shorter edge is 800 pixels [92]. Inference is performed on a single image scale.
items.zh: 我们将多级表示（HRNetV2 2p）4应用于目标检测。数据通过标准水平翻转增强。输入图像被调整使得短边为800像素[92]。推理在单图像尺度上进行。

items.en: We compare our HRNet with the standard models: ResNet [54] and ResNeXt [156]. We evaluate the detection performance on COCO val. under two anchor-based frameworks: Faster R-CNN [118] and Cascade R-CNN [12], and two recently-developed anchor-free frameworks: FCOS [136] and CenterNet [36]. We train the Faster R-CNN and Cascade R-CNN models for both our HRNetV222p and the ResNet on the public MMDetection platform [17] with the provided training setup, except that we use the learning rate schedule suggested in [52] for 2×2\times, and FCOS [136] and CenterNet [36] from the implementations provided by the authors. Table VII summarizes #parameters and GFLOPs. Table VIII and Table IX report detection scores.
items.zh: 我们将HRNet与标准模型ResNet[54]和ResNeXt[156]进行比较。我们在COCO val上评估两种基于锚点的框架：Faster R-CNN[118]和Cascade R-CNN[12]，以及两种最近开发的无锚点框架：FCOS[136]和CenterNet[36]。我们在公共MMDetection平台[17]上使用提供的训练设置训练Faster R-CNN和Cascade R-CNN模型（包括我们的HRNetV2 2p和ResNet），但使用[52]中建议的2×学习率调度，FCOS[136]和CenterNet[36]则使用作者提供的实现。表VII总结了参数量和GFLOPs。表VIII和表IX报告了检测分数。

items.en: We also evaluate the performance of joint detection and instance segmentation, under three frameworks: Mask R-CNN [53], Cascade Mask R-CNN [13], and Hybrid Task Cascade [16]. The results are obtained on the public MMDetection platform [17] and are in Table X.
items.zh: 我们还评估了联合检测和实例分割的性能，采用三种框架：Mask R-CNN[53]、Cascade Mask R-CNN[13]和Hybrid Task Cascade[16]。结果在公共MMDetection平台[17]上获得，见表X。

items.en: There are several observations. On the one hand, as shown in Tables VIII and IX, the overall object detection performance of HRNetV222 is better than ResNet under similar model size and computation complexity. In some cases, for 1×1\times, HRNetV2p-W181818 performs worse than ResNet-505050-FPN, which might come from insufficient optimization iterations. On the other hand, as shown in Table X, the overall object detection and instance segmentation performance is better than ResNet and ResNeXt. In particular, under the Hybrid Task Cascade framework, the HRNet performs slightly worse than ResNeXt-101101101-646464×\times444d-FPN for 20​e20𝑒20e, but better for 28​e28𝑒28e. This implies that our HRNet benefits more from longer training.
items.zh: 有几点观察。一方面，如表VIII和IX所示，在相似模型大小和计算复杂度下，HRNetV2 2p的整体目标检测性能优于ResNet。在某些情况下，对于1×，HRNetV2p-W18的性能低于ResNet-50-FPN，这可能是由于优化迭代不足。另一方面，如表X所示，整体目标检测和实例分割性能优于ResNet和ResNeXt。特别是在Hybrid Task Cascade框架下，HRNet在20e时略逊于ResNeXt-101-64×4d-FPN，但在28e时更好。这表明我们的HRNet从更长的训练中获益更多。

items.en: We perform the ablation study for the components in HRNet over two tasks: human pose estimation on COCO validation and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes validation. We mainly use HRNetV1-W323232 for human pose estimation, and HRNetV2-W484848 for semantic segmentation. All results of pose estimation are obtained over the input size 256×192256192256\times 192. We also present the results for comparing HRNetV111 and HRNetV222.
items.zh: 我们对HRNet的组件进行了消融研究，涉及两个任务：COCO验证集上的人体姿态估计和Cityscapes验证集上的语义分割。我们主要使用HRNetV1-W32进行人体姿态估计，使用HRNetV2-W48进行语义分割。所有姿态估计结果均在输入尺寸256×192下获得。我们还展示了HRNetV1和HRNetV2的比较结果。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Ablation study about the resolutions of the representations for human pose estimation. 1×1\times, 2×2\times, 4×4\times correspond to the representations of the high, medium, low resolutions, respectively. The results imply that higher resolution improves the performance.
items.capZh: 图9：关于人体姿态估计表示分辨率的消融研究。1×、2×、4×分别对应高、中、低分辨率表示。结果表明更高分辨率提升了性能。

items.en: Representations of different resolutions. We study how the representation resolution affects the pose estimation performance by checking the quality of the heatmap estimated from the feature maps of each resolution from high to low.
items.zh: 不同分辨率的表示。我们通过检查从高到低每个分辨率特征图估计的热图质量，研究表示分辨率如何影响姿态估计性能。

items.en: We train two HRNetV111 networks initialized by the model pretrained for the ImageNet classification. Our network outputs four response maps from high-to-low resolutions. The quality of heatmap prediction over the lowest-resolution response map is too low and the AP score is below 101010 points. The AP scores over the other three maps are reported in Figure 9. The comparison implies that the resolution does impact the keypoint prediction quality.
items.zh: 我们训练了两个HRNetV1网络，使用ImageNet分类预训练模型初始化。我们的网络输出从高到低分辨率的四个响应图。最低分辨率响应图上的热图预测质量太低，AP分数低于10分。其他三个图的AP分数报告在图9中。比较表明分辨率确实影响关键点预测质量。

items.en: Repeated multi-resolution fusion. We empirically analyze the effect of the repeated multi-resolution fusion. We study three variants of our network. (a) W/o intermediate fusion units (111 fusion): There is no fusion between multi-resolution streams except the final fusion unit. (b) W/ across-stage fusion units (333 fusions): There is no fusion between parallel streams within each stage. (c) W/ both across-stage and within-stage fusion units (totally 888 fusions): This is our proposed method. All the networks are trained from scratch. The results on COCO human pose estimation and Cityscapes semantic segmentation (validation) given in Table XII show that the multi-resolution fusion unit is helpful and more fusions lead to better performance.
items.zh: 重复的多分辨率融合。我们实证分析了重复多分辨率融合的效果。我们研究了网络的三种变体。(a) 无中间融合单元（1次融合）：多分辨率流之间除了最终融合单元外没有融合。(b) 有跨阶段融合单元（3次融合）：每个阶段内的并行流之间没有融合。(c) 同时有跨阶段和阶段内融合单元（总共8次融合）：这是我们提出的方法。所有网络从头训练。表XII中给出的COCO人体姿态估计和Cityscapes语义分割（验证集）结果表明，多分辨率融合单元是有帮助的，更多的融合带来更好的性能。

items.en: We also study other possible choices for the fusion design: (i) use bilinear downsample to replace strided convolutions, and (ii) use the multiplication operation to replace the sum operation. In the former case, the COCO pose estimation AP score and the Cityscapes segmentation mIoU score are reduced to 72.672.672.6 and 74.274.274.2. The reason is that downsampling reduces the volume size (width ×\times height ×\times #channels) of the representation maps, and strided convolutions learn better volume size reduction than bilinear downsampling. In the later case, the results are much worse: 54.754.754.7 and 66.066.066.0, respectively. The possible reason might be that multiplication increases the training difficulty as pointed in [145].
items.zh: 我们还研究了融合设计的其他可能选择：(i) 使用双线性下采样代替步长卷积，(ii) 使用乘法操作代替求和操作。在前一种情况下，COCO姿态估计AP分数和Cityscapes分割mIoU分数分别降至72.6和74.2。原因是下采样减少了表示图的体积大小（宽度×高度×通道数），而步长卷积比双线性下采样学习到更好的体积大小缩减。在后一种情况下，结果更差：分别为54.7和66.0。可能的原因如[145]所指出的，乘法增加了训练难度。

items.en: Resolution maintenance. We study the performance of a variant of the HRNet: all the four high-to-low resolution streams are added at the beginning and the depths of the four streams are the same; the fusion schemes are the same to ours. Both the HRNets and the variants (with similar #Params and GFLOPs) are trained from scratch.
items.zh: 分辨率维持。我们研究了HRNet的一种变体：所有四个从高到低的分辨率流从一开始就添加，且四个流的深度相同；融合方案与我们的相同。HRNet和变体（具有相似的参数量和GFLOPs）都从头训练。

items.en: The human pose estimation performance (AP) on COCO val for the variant is 72.572.572.5, which is lower than 73.473.473.4 for HRNetV111-W323232. The segmentation performance (mIoU) on Cityscapes val for the variant is 75.775.775.7, which is lower than 76.476.476.4 for HRNetV222-W484848. We believe that the reason is that the low-level features extracted from the early stages over the low-resolution streams are less helpful. In addition, another simple variant, only the high-resolution stream of similar #parameters and GFLOPs without low-resolution parallel streams shows much lower performance on COCO and Cityscapes.
items.zh: 该变体在COCO val上的人体姿态估计性能（AP）为72.5，低于HRNetV1-W32的73.4。在Cityscapes val上的分割性能（mIoU）为75.7，低于HRNetV2-W48的76.4。我们认为原因是低分辨率流早期阶段提取的低级特征帮助较小。此外，另一个简单变体，即只有高分辨率流（类似参数量和GFLOPs）而没有低分辨率并行流，在COCO和Cityscapes上表现更差。

items.en: V111 vs. V222. We compare HRNetV222 and HRNetV222p, to HRNetV111 on pose estimation, semantic segmentation and COCO object detection. For human pose estimation, the performance is similar. For example, HRNetV222-W323232 (w/o ImageNet pretraining) achieves the AP score 73.673.673.6, which is slightly higher than 73.473.473.4 HRNetV111-W323232.
items.zh: V1 vs. V2。我们将HRNetV2和HRNetV2p与HRNetV1在姿态估计、语义分割和COCO目标检测上进行比较。对于人体姿态估计，性能相似。例如，HRNetV2-W32（无ImageNet预训练）的AP分数为73.6，略高于HRNetV1-W32的73.4。

items.en: The segmentation and object detection results, given in Figure 10 (a) and Figure 10 (b), imply that HRNetV222 outperforms HRNetV111 significantly, except that the gain is minor in the large model case (1×1\times) in segmentation for Cityscapes. We also test a variant (denoted by HRNetV111h), which is built by appending a 1×1111\times 1 convolution to align the dimension of the output high-resolution representation with the dimension of HRNetV222. The results in Figure 10 (a) and Figure 10 (b) show that the variant achieves slight improvement to HRNetV111, implying that aggregating the representations from low-resolution parallel convolutions in our HRNetV222 is essential for improving the capability.
items.zh: 图10(a)和图10(b)给出的分割和物体检测结果表明，HRNetV222显著优于HRNetV111，但在Cityscapes分割的大模型情况（1×）下增益较小。我们还测试了一个变体（记为HRNetV111h），它通过附加一个1×1卷积来对齐输出高分辨率表示的维度与HRNetV222的维度。图10(a)和图10(b)的结果显示，该变体相比HRNetV111仅有轻微改进，这表明在我们的HRNetV222中聚合来自低分辨率并行卷积的表示对于提升能力至关重要。

items.en: In this paper, we present a high-resolution network for visual recognition problems. There are three fundamental differences from existing low-resolution classification networks and high-resolution representation learning networks: (\romannum1) Connect high and low resolution convolutions in parallel other than in series; (\romannum2) Maintain high resolution through the whole process instead of recovering high resolution from low resolution; and (\romannum3) Fuse multi-resolution representations repeatedly, rendering rich high-resolution representations with strong position sensitivity.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视觉识别问题的高分辨率网络。与现有的低分辨率分类网络和高分辨率表示学习网络相比，存在三个根本区别：（\romannum1）并行而非串行连接高分辨率和低分辨率卷积；（\romannum2）在整个过程中保持高分辨率，而非从低分辨率恢复高分辨率；（\romannum3）重复融合多分辨率表示，从而产生具有强位置敏感性的丰富高分辨率表示。

items.en: The superior results on a wide range of visual recognition problems suggest that our proposed HRNet is a stronger backbone for computer vision problems. Our research also encourages more research efforts for designing network architectures directly for specific vision problems other than extending, remediating or repairing representations learned from low-resolution networks (e.g., ResNet or VGGNet).
items.zh: 在广泛的视觉识别问题上的优异结果表明，我们提出的HRNet是计算机视觉问题的一个更强的主干网络。我们的研究也鼓励更多研究努力直接针对特定视觉问题设计网络架构，而非扩展、修复或修补从低分辨率网络（如ResNet或VGGNet）学习到的表示。

items.en: Discussions. There is a possible misunderstanding: the memory cost of the HRNet is larger as the resolution is higher. In fact, the memory cost of the HRNet for all the three applications, human pose estimation, semantic segmentation and object detection, is comparable to state-of-the-arts except that the training memory cost in object detection is a little larger.
items.zh: 讨论。可能存在一个误解：HRNet的内存成本因分辨率更高而更大。实际上，HRNet在人体姿态估计、语义分割和物体检测这三种应用中的内存成本与现有技术相当，除了物体检测中的训练内存成本稍大。

items.en: In addition, we summarize the runtime cost comparison on the PyTorch 1.01.01.0 platform. The training and inference time cost of the HRNet is comparable to previous state-of-the-arts except that (1) the inference time of the HRNet for segmentation is much smaller and (2) the training time of the HRNet for pose estimation is a little larger, but the cost on the MXNet 1.5.11.5.11.5.1 platform, which supports static graph inference, is similar as SimpleBaseline. We would like to highlight that for semantic segmentation the inference cost is significantly smaller than PSPNet and DeepLabv333. Table XIII summarizes memory and time cost comparisons 555The detailed comparisons are given in the supplementary file..
items.zh: 此外，我们总结了在PyTorch 1.0平台上的运行时成本比较。HRNet的训练和推理时间成本与先前的最先进技术相当，除了（1）HRNet用于分割的推理时间更小，以及（2）HRNet用于姿态估计的训练时间稍大，但在支持静态图推理的MXNet 1.5.1平台上，成本与SimpleBaseline相似。我们想强调，对于语义分割，推理成本显著小于PSPNet和DeepLabv3。表XIII总结了内存和时间成本比较。

items.en: Future and followup works. We will study the combination of the HRNet with other techniques for semantic segmentation and instance segmentation. Currently, we have results (mIoU), which are depicted in Tables III IV V VI, by combining the HRNet with the object-contextual representation (OCR) scheme [170] 666We empirically observed that the HRNet combined with ASPP [20] or PPM [181] did not get a performance improvement on Cityscape, but got a slight improvement on PASCAL-Context and LIP., a variant of object context [171, 59]. We will conduct the study by further increasing the resolution of the representation, e.g., to 1212\frac{1}{2} or even a full resolution.
items.zh: 未来和后续工作。我们将研究HRNet与其他技术结合用于语义分割和实例分割。目前，我们通过将HRNet与对象上下文表示（OCR）方案[170]（对象上下文[171, 59]的一个变体）结合，得到了结果（mIoU），如表III IV V VI所示。我们将通过进一步提高表示的分辨率（例如，1/2甚至全分辨率）来进行研究。

items.en: The applications of the HRNet are not limited to the above that we have done, and are suitable to other position-sensitive vision applications, such as facial landmark detection777 We provide the facial landmark detection results in the supplementary file., super-resolution, optical flow estimation, depth estimation, and so on. There are already followup works, e.g., image stylization [83], inpainting [50], image enhancement [62], image dehazing [1], temporal pose estimation [6], and drone object detection [190].
items.zh: HRNet的应用不仅限于我们已完成的上述任务，还适用于其他位置敏感的视觉应用，如面部关键点检测、超分辨率、光流估计、深度估计等。已有后续工作，例如图像风格化[83]、图像修复[50]、图像增强[62]、图像去雾[1]、时间姿态估计[6]和无人机物体检测[190]。

items.en: It is reported in [26] that a slightly-modified HRNet combined with ASPP achieved the best performance for Mapillary panoptic segmentation in the single model case. In the COCO + Mapillary Joint Recognition Challenge Workshop at ICCV 2019, the COCO DensePose challenge winner and almost all the COCO keypoint detection challenge participants adopted the HRNet. The OpenImage instance segmentation challenge winner (ICCV 2019) also used the HRNet.
items.zh: 据[26]报道，一个略微修改的HRNet与ASPP结合在单模型情况下为Mapillary全景分割取得了最佳性能。在ICCV 2019的COCO + Mapillary联合识别挑战研讨会上，COCO DensePose挑战赛获胜者和几乎所有COCO关键点检测挑战赛参与者都采用了HRNet。OpenImage实例分割挑战赛获胜者（ICCV 2019）也使用了HRNet。
